title: Self Employment
description: The Deepayan Foundation's Self Employment program is dedicated to combating poverty and improving economic security in underserved and vulnerable communities across Bangladesh. Through this initiative, the foundation ensures that vocational training, financial literacy, and essential resource tools reach vulnerable populations, including low-income families, women, and unemployed youth. By partnering with local artisans, industry experts, and dedicated volunteers, Deepayan Foundation hosts skill development workshops and provides small-scale livelihood resources on a regular basis, ensuring consistent access to sustainable income opportunities. The program also focuses on raising awareness about entrepreneurship, promoting financial self-sustainability through business education, and supporting long-term economic independence. With a commitment to fostering a self-reliant and prosperous world, the foundation's self-employment program brings hope and financial stability to individuals, empowering communities to thrive.
